lines.english: The body may be washed with loads of water,
The mind is overflowing with the greasy dirt of egotistical pride.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੈਲੁ ਨ ਉਤਰੈ ਸੁਧੁ ਨ ਤੇਹੀ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: mail na utarai sudh na tehee |2|
lines.english: and yet its filth is not removed, and it does not become clean. ||2||
With the dust of the feet of the Holy, it is scrubbed clean. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਸਿਮਰਿ ਸਿਮਰਿ ਕਾਟਿਆ ਭਉ ਕਾਲ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: har simar simar kaattiaa bhau kaal |3|
lines.english: Meditating, meditating in remembrance on the Lord, I am rid of the fear of death. ||3||
I have met the True Guru, who is merciful forever.
Gauree, Fifth Mehl:
With loving devotional worship, O Nanak, sing His Glorious Praises. ||4||100||169||
Liberation, pleasures and worldly success are all in the Lord's Name.
The Lord's slaves attain the highest status of life.
Meeting them, the soul is enlightened. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਕਾ ਸਿਮਰਨੁ ਸੁਨਿ ਮਨ ਕਾਨੀ ॥
lines.translit: har kaa simaran sun man kaanee |
lines.english: Those who listen with their mind and ears to the Lord's meditative remembrance,
Twenty-four hours a day, meditate on the Sustainer of the World.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੁਖੁ ਪਾਵਹਿ ਹਰਿ ਦੁਆਰ ਪਰਾਨੀ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: sukh paaveh har duaar paraanee |1| rahaau |
lines.english: are blessed with peace at the Lord's Gate, O mortal. ||1||Pause||
O Nanak, gazing on the Blessed Vision of His Darshan, I am enraptured. ||2||101||170||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਾਪ ਪਾਪ ਬਿਨਸੇ ਮੇਰੇ ਭਾਈ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: taap paap binase mere bhaaee |1| rahaau |
lines.english: The burning sins have departed, O my Siblings of Destiny. ||1||Pause||
Gauree, Fifth Mehl:
Peace and tranquility have come; the Guru, the Lord of the Universe, has brought it.
With your tongue, continually chant the Lord's Name.
Disease shall depart, and you shall be saved. ||1||
Contemplate the Glorious Virtues of the Unfathomable Supreme Lord God.
Sing the Glories of God each and every day;
In the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy, you shall be emancipated. ||2||
your afflictions shall be dispelled, and you shall be saved, my humble friend. ||3||
Slave Nanak has come to Your Sanctuary. ||4||102||171||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨ ਬਚ ਕ੍ਰਮ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਅਪਨਾ ਧਿਆਈ ॥
lines.translit: man bach kram prabh apanaa dhiaaee |
lines.english: In thought, word and deed, I meditate on my God.
Gauree, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਰਮ ਗਏ ਪੂਰਨ ਭਈ ਸੇਵ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: bharam ge pooran bhee sev |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Doubt has been dispelled; my service has been successful. ||1||Pause||
The Divine Guru has opened his eyes.
O Nanak, he alone lives, who chants the Naam, the Name of the Lord.
In the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy, drink deeply of the Lord's Ambrosial Nectar. ||2||103||172||
The Giver of joy has saved him from smallpox.
The Supreme Lord God has granted His Grace. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਧਨੁ ਓਇ ਭਗਤ ਜਿਨ ਤੁਮ ਸੰਗਿ ਹੇਤ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: dhan oe bhagat jin tum sang het |1|
lines.english: blessed are those devotees who are in love with You. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਧਨੁ ਓਹੁ ਮਸਤਕੁ ਧਨੁ ਤੇਰੇ ਨੇਤ ॥
lines.translit: dhan ohu masatak dhan tere net |
lines.english: Blessed is that forehead, and blessed are those eyes;
Gauree, Fifth Mehl:
Without the Naam, the Name of the Lord, how anyone find peace?

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਸਨਾ ਰਾਮ ਨਾਮ ਜਸੁ ਕਹੀਐ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: rasanaa raam naam jas kaheeai |1| rahaau |
lines.english: With your tongue, chant the Praises of the Name of the Lord. ||1||Pause||
who meditate on the Lord of Nirvaanaa. ||2||104||173||
Nanak is a sacrifice to those
You preserve, protect and care for me. ||1||
Such is the Lord, our Help and Support in this world and the next.
You are my Advisor; You are always with me.
Gauree, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਗੈ ਆਪਿ ਇਹੁ ਥਾਨੁ ਵਸਿ ਜਾ ਕੈ ॥
lines.translit: aagai aap ihu thaan vas jaa kai |
lines.english: He alone exists hereafter; this place is in His Power.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦਾਸ ਕੀ ਪੈਜ ਰਖੈ ਮੇਰੇ ਭਾਈ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: daas kee paij rakhai mere bhaaee |1| rahaau |
lines.english: He protects the honor of His slave, O my Sibling of Destiny. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਠ ਪਹਰ ਮਨੁ ਹਰਿ ਕਉ ਜਾਪੈ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: aatth pehar man har kau jaapai |2|
lines.english: Twenty-four hours a day, O my mind, chant and meditate on the Lord. ||2||
the Lord Himself issues His Royal Command. ||3||
His honor is acknowledged, and he bears the True Insignia;

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਿਤ ਨਿਤ ਨਾਨਕ ਰਾਮ ਨਾਮੁ ਸਮਾਲਿ ॥੪॥੧੦੫॥੧੭੪॥
lines.translit: nit nit naanak raam naam samaal |4|105|174|
lines.english: Continually, continuously, O Nanak, dwell upon the Name of the Lord. ||4||105||174||
He Himself is the Giver; He Himself is the Cherisher.

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਾਮੁ ਰਵਤ ਸਦ ਹੀ ਸੁਖੁ ਪਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: raam ravat sad hee sukh paaeaa |
lines.english: Meditating on the Lord, I have found eternal peace.
Gauree, Fifth Mehl:
the Lord of the World abides in the heart forever. ||1||
When the Perfect True Guru becomes merciful,
